root.sql:
select (case ta.nature when 'CR' then real_1 end) as CR_real_1 ,(case ta.nature when 'DR' then real_1 end) as DR_real_1 ,(case ta.nature when 'CR' then real_2 end) as CR_real_2 ,(case ta.nature when 'DR' then real_2 end) as DR_real_2 ,(case ta.nature when 'CR' then real_3 end) as CR_real_3 ,(case ta.nature when 'DR' then real_3 end) as DR_real_3 ,(case ta.nature when 'CR' then real_4 end) as CR_real_4 ,(case ta.nature when 'DR' then real_4 end) as DR_real_4 ,(case ta.nature when 'CR' then real_5 end) as CR_real_5 ,(case ta.nature when 'DR' then real_5 end) as DR_real_5 ,(case ta.nature when 'CR' then real_6 end) as CR_real_6 ,(case ta.nature when 'DR' then real_6 end) as DR_real_6 ,(case ta.nature when 'CR' then real_7 end) as CR_real_7 ,(case ta.nature when 'DR' then real_7 end) as DR_real_7 ,(case ta.nature when 'CR' then real_8 end) as CR_real_8 ,(case ta.nature when 'DR' then real_8 end) as DR_real_8 ,(case ta.nature when 'CR' then real_9 end) as CR_real_9 ,(case ta.nature when 'DR' then real_9 end) as DR_real_9 ,(case ta.nature when 'CR' then real_10 end) as CR_real_10 ,(case ta.nature when 'DR' then real_10 end) as DR_real_10 ,(case ta.nature when 'CR' then real_11 end) as CR_real_11 ,(case ta.nature when 'DR' then real_11 end) as DR_real_11 ,(case ta.nature when 'CR' then real_12 end) as CR_real_12 ,(case ta.nature when 'DR' then real_12 end) as DR_real_12 ,(case ta.nature when 'CR' then real_last_month end) as CR_real_last_month ,(case ta.nature when 'DR' then real_last_month end) as DR_real_last_month ,(case ta.nature when 'CR' then real_last_year end) as CR_real_last_year ,(case ta.nature when 'DR' then real_last_year end) as DR_real_last_year ,(case ta.nature when 'CR' then real_this_year end) as CR_real_this_year ,(case ta.nature when 'DR' then real_this_year end) as DR_real_this_year ,ta.* from ( SELECT sc_acc_m_account_budget_group.account_year + 543 as account_year , sc_acc_m_account_budget_group.budget_name , sc_acc_m_account_budget.budget_id , sc_acc_m_account_budget.account_budget ,(case sc_acc_m_account_master.nature when 'CR' then sc_acc_m_account_budget.account_budget end) as CR_account_budget ,(case sc_acc_m_account_master.nature when 'DR' then sc_acc_m_account_budget.account_budget end) as DR_account_budget , sc_acc_m_account_budget.account_id , sc_acc_m_account_master.nature , sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name
, PKA_ACC_BUDGET.fp_usedMonth( sc_acc_m_account_budget_group.account_year::int, 1 , sc_acc_m_account_budget.account_id , null ) as real_1 , PKA_ACC_BUDGET.fp_usedMonth( sc_acc_m_account_budget_group.account_year::int, 2 , sc_acc_m_account_budget.account_id , null ) as real_2 , PKA_ACC_BUDGET.fp_usedMonth( sc_acc_m_account_budget_group.account_year::int, 3 , sc_acc_m_account_budget.account_id , null ) as real_3 , PKA_ACC_BUDGET.fp_usedMonth( sc_acc_m_account_budget_group.account_year::int, 4 , sc_acc_m_account_budget.account_id , null ) as real_4 , PKA_ACC_BUDGET.fp_usedMonth( sc_acc_m_account_budget_group.account_year::int, 5 , sc_acc_m_account_budget.account_id , null ) as real_5 , PKA_ACC_BUDGET.fp_usedMonth( sc_acc_m_account_budget_group.account_year::int, 6 , sc_acc_m_account_budget.account_id , null ) as real_6 , PKA_ACC_BUDGET.fp_usedMonth( sc_acc_m_account_budget_group.account_year::int, 7 , sc_acc_m_account_budget.account_id , null ) as real_7 , PKA_ACC_BUDGET.fp_usedMonth( sc_acc_m_account_budget_group.account_year::int, 8 , sc_acc_m_account_budget.account_id , null ) as real_8 , PKA_ACC_BUDGET.fp_usedMonth( sc_acc_m_account_budget_group.account_year::int, 9 , sc_acc_m_account_budget.account_id , null ) as real_9 , PKA_ACC_BUDGET.fp_usedMonth( sc_acc_m_account_budget_group.account_year::int, 10 , sc_acc_m_account_budget.account_id , null ) as real_10 , PKA_ACC_BUDGET.fp_usedMonth( sc_acc_m_account_budget_group.account_year::int, 11 , sc_acc_m_account_budget.account_id , null ) as real_11 , PKA_ACC_BUDGET.fp_usedMonth( sc_acc_m_account_budget_group.account_year::int, 12 , sc_acc_m_account_budget.account_id , null ) as real_12 , PKA_ACC_BUDGET.fp_usedCumu( sc_acc_m_account_budget_group.account_year::int- 1, sc_cnt_m_month.month_no::int , sc_acc_m_account_budget.account_id , null ) as real_last_year , PKA_ACC_BUDGET.fp_usedMonth( sc_acc_m_account_budget_group.account_year::int- 1, sc_cnt_m_month.month_no::int , sc_acc_m_account_budget.account_id , null ) as real_last_month
, PKA_ACC_BUDGET.fp_usedCumu( sc_acc_m_account_budget_group.account_year::int, sc_cnt_m_month.month_no::int , sc_acc_m_account_budget.account_id , null ) as real_this_year
,sc_cnt_m_month.month_name_thai ,sc_cnt_m_month.shot_month_thai
,sc_acc_m_account_budget.sort_order FROM sc_acc_m_account_budget ,sc_acc_m_account_budget_group ,sc_acc_m_account_master , sc_cnt_m_month WHERE sc_acc_m_account_budget_group.account_year = sc_acc_m_account_budget.account_year and sc_acc_m_account_budget_group.budget_id = sc_acc_m_account_budget.budget_id and sc_acc_m_account_budget.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id /*WHERE*/ --and sc_acc_m_account_budget_group.account_year = 2019
order by sc_acc_m_account_budget.budget_id , sc_acc_m_account_budget.sort_order , sc_acc_m_account_budget.account_id )ta
